**Charles Josiah Rusch Alandt**   
Santa Catarina, Brazil  
echo "Y2hhcmxlcy5hbGFuZHRAZ21haWwuY29tCg==" | base64 -d <br>
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/charlesjosiah) | [GitHub](https://github.com/charles-josiah) | [Credly](https://www.credly.com/users/charlesjosiah)

### **Professional Summary**

Results-oriented IT professional with over 15 years of experience in **infrastructure**, **network management**, **cloud computing**, and **security**. Proficient in **Linux administration**, **DevOps methodologies**, and **Site Reliability Engineering (SRE)**. Demonstrated expertise in designing scalable and secure systems, implementing cost-saving solutions, and mentoring teams. Skilled communicator with a strong focus on delivering value-driven IT solutions.

### **Skills & Expertise**

* **Cloud Computing**: AWS, Azure, OCI, GCP, Private Clouds (Unifique, Equinix)  
* **Infrastructure as Code (IaC)**: Terraform, CloudFormation, Ansible  
* **DevOps & Automation**: Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD pipelines  
* **Networking**: Routing protocols (BGP, OSPF, ECMP), VPNs (IPSec, OpenVPN, others)  
* **Security**: Firewalls (Linux, Fortinet, Cisco), Monitoring (Datadog, Zabbix, others)  
* **Virtualization**: Proxmox, VMware, OLVM, KVM   
* **Programming**: Shell Script, Python  
* **Languages**: English (Professional Proficiency), Portuguese (Native), German (Professional Proficiency)

### **Professional Experience**:

Cloud Engineer & SysAdmin/Cloud Architect | Exímio Soluções em TI | 08/2024 \- Present

* Delivered Level 3 technical support, resolving escalations and providing the support team with advanced product expertise across diverse IT areas.  
* Authored comprehensive knowledge base articles, internal wikis, and conducted team training sessions to enhance operational efficiency.  
* Played a key role in service migration projects, transitioning on-premises infrastructure to Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI).  
* Designed and deployed multi-cloud architectures leveraging AWS, Azure, and OCI to meet client needs.  
* Boosted system performance by implementing containerization strategies, developing custom automation scripts, and fine-tuning environments for optimal efficiency.  
* Strengthened security through automated compliance enforcement in OCI, advanced firewall configurations, and tailored security scripting solutions.

Fractional DevOps Engineer ( 3-month contract) | GoVyrl DBA Carro | 03/2025 – 06/2025

* Brought in on a 3-month contract to optimize AWS infrastructure and DevOps workflows for Carro and Modern Dropship.  
* Identified and implemented cost-saving strategies across production and non-production environments, significantly reducing AWS expenditure.  
* Enhanced system stability and reliability through infrastructure tuning, monitoring improvements, and proactive failover strategies.  
* Simplified and automated complex application deployments using IaC and CI/CD pipelines, improving deployment consistency and velocity.  
* Optimized AWS resource allocation and scaling policies, ensuring efficient usage while maintaining performance under load.  
* Automated routine resource management and provisioning tasks with Terraform and custom scripting, increasing team agility and reducing manual overhead.

Cloud & Security Administrator | Körber Supply Chain LATAM | 03/2023-08/2024

* Led the migration of legacy systems from on-premises and AWS/Azure to Oracle Cloud (OCI) with a focus on enhancing security.  
* Automated infrastructure management and provisioning using Terraform and Ansible.  
* Developed scripts to optimize server and network performance while streamlining cloud operations.  
* Collaborated with the FinOps team to identify cost-intensive systems, proposing and implementing improvements to optimize expenses.

Enterprise Support \- TAM | Amazon Web Services (AWS) | 05/2022 \- 01/2024

* Account management: Acted as the primary point of contact for assigned customer accounts, establishing and maintaining strong relationships to ensure customer satisfaction.  
* Customer Relationship: Develop and foster strong partnerships with AWS customers, dedicated to advocating for their interests within the AWS ecosystem to ensure the delivery of the optimal and exceptional experience.  
* Deliver expert technical guidance to customers, facilitating their effective utilization of AWS services like EKS, Karpenter, ELB (Elastic Load Balancer), AWS Firewall, and AWS Shield Tower. Offer support in configuring and implementing these services, optimizing features such as DDOS protection, North-South and East-West packet inspections, and firewall settings. Leverage AWS Control Tower capabilities to bolster governance, compliance, and multi-account management for enhanced operational control.  
* Troubleshooting: Collaborate with AWS support teams to identify and resolve technical issues, utilizing internal escalation mechanisms for prompt and effective problem resolution.  
* Finops: Implement FinOps to optimize costs and enhance control. Foster ownership and follow  Cloud Cost Center of Excellence \- CCoE best practices. Encourage cross-department collaboration to identify financial improvement opportunities.

IT Consultant \- IT Infrastructure | Linux Servers | Networking, Multitask Consultoria Ltda | 03/2012 \- 11/2024

* Deliver comprehensive IT solutions and implement projects across various domains, including Linux servers, networking, and IT infrastructure  
* Provide IT consultancy services to clients, ensuring the successful implementation of projects  
* Conducted advanced troubleshooting network and operating system environments.  
* Cloud environments:  AWS, GCP, Azure, OCI and private clouds like Unifique, Equinix   
* Design environments (VPC/SG/NACL/DNS/ELB): AWS, GCP, Private Cloud and on premise   
* Microservice environments: Docker and Kubernetes   
* Virtualizations: Proxmox, VMWare, XEN, KVM, OLVM \- Oracle Linux Virtualization Manager  
* Operations Systems:  Linux and FreeBSD  
* Routing devices: Linux, Cisco, 3Com, HP, Mikrotik and Ubiquiti.  
* Firewalls devices: Linux, FreeBSD, PFSense, Cisco, Fortinet, Mikrotik, and Ubiquiti.  
* VPN Technologies: IPSEC, OpenVPN, PPTP, and VTUN   
* Routing Protocols: Static Routing, BGP, OSPF,  RIPv(1|2), ECMP  
* Programming: Shell Script and Python   
* Storages: IBM Storwize, HP EVA and 3PAR, DELL Compellent, EqualLogic and PowerStore, EMC Clariion and Celerra, FreeNAS, and NAS4Free.  
* Infrastructure-as-Code: Terraform and Cloudformation.

Senior Teaching Specialist, SENAI/SC \- Serviço Nacional de Aprendizagem Industrial | 01/2016 \- Present

* Deliver telecom technologies knowledge and expertise while mentoring students  
* Contribute to the development and improvement of educational programs and curriculum  
* Covered topics including Fundamentals of Information Technology, Networking Fundamentals, Administration and Support of Open Source Operating Systems, Installation and Configuration of DNS and Email Services, Installation of Client Operating Systems and Applications, IT Security Services, Structured Cabling Project, Network Management, Integrated Project in Network Administration, and Project Management.  
* Equipped students with practical skills and expertise necessary for success in the field

Developer Master \- SRE, CI\&T \- ciandt.com | 12/2021 \- 05/2022

* Worked as a Developer Master, specializing in deploying and finding solutions for complex infrastructure challenges with a focus on Site Reliability Engineering (SRE).  
* Made significant contributions to the development and maintenance of reliable and scalable software systems.  
* Utilized expertise in SRE principles to ensure optimal performance, high availability, and seamless operations.  
* Continuously sought innovative approaches and implemented best practices to enhance system reliability and efficiency.  
* I designed Node.js libraries to seamlessly integrate Datadog, ensuring accurate APM configuration upon the initial launch of any application and enabling proper monitoring of newly launched applications.  
* Our team optimized the utilization of Datadog across multiple teams, working collaboratively to design and implement SLA and SLO metrics for cohesive performance and reliability monitoring. To enhance visibility, we established dedicated real-time dashboards in Datadog, enabling effective tracking and analysis of these metrics.

Senior Teaching Specialist, Ensino Superior da Grande Florianópolis \- IESGF | 08/2018 \- 02/2022

* Mentored students and facilitated their understanding of IT complex concepts  
* As a professor, I have taught courses on Structured Cabling, Operating Systems for Computer Networks, Open Operating Systems, Open and Mobile Operating Systems, Convergent Networks, and Fundamentals of Operating Systems.  
* Provided specialized instruction to college-level and bachelor students in relevant subjects. Mentored and facilitated students' understanding of complex IT concepts, fostering their growth and development in the field

SRE, Involves | 01/2021 \- 01/2022

* Worked as a Site Reliability Engineer \- SRE, ensuring the reliability and performance of software systems   
* Collaborated with cross-functional teams, collaborative professional with expertise in optimizing system infrastructure and deployment processes.  
* Successfully partnered with cross-functional teams with DBA experts to optimize AWS RDS services. Led the seamless migration of  EC2 Instance with MongoDB from a  8TB cluster with 3 replicas to 20 different MongoDB instances on Atlas Database SaaS Service, splitting the customers based IO and their usage.  
* Successfully executed the migration of on-premise and based Instance EC2 MySQL and PostgreSQL databases to AWS RDS Aurora and PostgreSQL, ensuring minimal downtime and data integrity.  
* Collaborated with the DBA team to activate and migrate databases to advanced AWS RDS Aurora and PostgreSQL singles instances to multi-AZ, multi-region deployments, and read replicas clusters. Enhancing scalability, availability, and disaster recovery capabilities.  
* Implemented a comprehensive Datadog monitoring system, providing full-stack Application Performance Monitoring (APM) capabilities, network visibility, and monitoring support for Docker, container instances, and both relational and non-relational databases.

Teaching Specialist, iBem \- Instituto Brasileiro de Ensino Multidisciplinar | 01/2020 \- 10/2020

* Delivered specialized instruction and training in relevant IT subjects to students.  
* Developed curriculum and instructional materials to enhance learning paths and experiences.  
* Taught the course of Computer Forensics and Cryptography in the Information Security program.

Teaching Specialist, Senac Santa Catarina | 03/2014 \- 12/2018

* Provided concise and effective instruction and training in a diverse range of IT-related subjects to develop students' skills and knowledge.  
* Covered topics including Fundamentals of Information Technology, Networking Fundamentals, Administration and Support of Open Source Operating Systems, Installation and Configuration of DNS and Email Services, Installation of Client Operating Systems and Applications, IT Security Services, Structured Cabling Project, Network Management, Integrated Project in Network Administration, and Project Management.  
* Equipped students with practical skills and expertise necessary for success in the field.

Senior Sysadmin / DevOps, Alandt Servers | 02/2010 \- 12/2015

* I meticulously handle system administration and DevOps responsibilities to guarantee the seamless functioning of hosting servers.  
* Implemented and maintained Linux servers and related technologies

Network and IT consultant, VVV Tecnologia | 10/2007 \- 12/2013

* Provided consulting services in network, VoIP and IT infrastructure to clients  
* Designed and implemented customized solutions based on clients' requirements with linux, asterisk, sip and opensource virtualization. 

Senior Product Development Engineer, Intelbras | 05/2012 \- 09/2012

* Actively contributed to the development and enhancement of Intelbras' telecom, CCTV, and security products.  
* Played a key role in driving innovation and improving functionalities, ensuring the company's leadership in the industry.  
* Collaborated with diverse teams to ensure product quality and performance.  
* Worked closely with experts from various disciplines to leverage collective expertise and deliver high-quality solutions.

Sysadmin and Network Administrator, Intelbras | 06/2011 \- 05/2012

* Managed network administration tasks and ensured the smooth operation of network infrastructure  
* Projected, implemented, and maintained cutting-edge network technologies to enhance efficiency and maximize performance.

Network and Telecom Projects Coordinator Manager, AGM Telecom | 01/2003 \- 06/2011

* Managed and coordinated network and infrastructure projects in the telecom industry  
* Led projects involving Cisco, VoIP, IP telephony, networks, firewall, security, Linux, and customized solutions  
* Provided telecom consulting and analysis services
